subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! I know not what hath kept me distant from the court of Thy nearness, nor what hath prevented me from entering the gate of Thy majesty and might [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی لم ادر ما ابعدنی عن بساط قربک و ما منعنی عن الورود فی باب عظمتک وعزتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @Muhammad; Islam, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
